creator: conrad@th.physik.uni-bonn.de
text:
On Tue, 20 Feb 2001, Valeriy Ushakov wrote:

> As I explained recently (Tue, 13 Feb 2001) on freebsd-ports:
> make sure /bin comes in your PATH before /usr/bin.
>
thanks for your message :-) It worked...

Since /bin is usually statically compiled and /usr/bin is not, /bin must
not come before /usr/bin in the path...

I think it's better to solve the problem by symlinking uname from
xxx/usr/bin to xx/bin

ciao
	Jan
